sql_array: CREATE SCHEMA test_schema; SET SCHEMA test_schema; CREATE TABLE users (id INT, name VARCHAR(100));
SET SCHEMA test_schema; INSERT INTO users (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Alice');
SET SCHEMA test_schema; UPDATE users SET name = 'Bob' WHERE id = 1;
SET SCHEMA test_schema; SELECT * FROM users;
SET SCHEMA test_schema; DROP TABLE users;
